import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:3001/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// API 响应类型
export const projectApi={getAll:()=>api.get('/projects'),getById:id=>api.get("/projects/".concat(id)),create:data=>api.post('/projects',data),update:(id,data)=>api.put("/projects/".concat(id),data),delete:id=>api.delete("/projects/".concat(id))};export const coverageApi={getByProject:projectId=>api.get("/coverage/project/".concat(projectId)),getById:id=>api.get("/coverage/".concat(id)),getLatest:projectId=>api.get("/coverage/project/".concat(projectId,"/latest")),getTrend:function(projectId){let days=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:30;return api.get("/coverage/project/".concat(projectId,"/trend?days=").concat(days));},getFileCoverage:(reportId,filePath)=>api.get("/coverage/".concat(reportId,"/file?path=").concat(encodeURIComponent(filePath)))};export const uploadApi={uploadCoverage:formData=>api.post('/upload/coverage',formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}})};export default api;
